case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. OSCAR RANIEL PEREZ ANTUNEZ

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT OSCAR RANIEL PEREZ ANTUNEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
